MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-27-2026 Vacated

Motion To Compel Responses Of Plaintiffs Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set Two And Demand For Identification And Inspection Of Documents, Set Two; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-13-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendants Livia Roque and Lisandro Roque's Motion To Compel Responses Of Plaintiffs Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set Two And Demand For Identification And Inspection Of Documents, Set Two; Request For Sanctions is OFF CALENDAR.

The court has been notified that this case has settled. The motion, therefore, is off calendar.

In any event, Defendants have not demonstrated the motion was timely served. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b) [motion must be filed and served 16 court days before hearing]; Code of Civil Procedure section 1013(a) [service by mail where place of address and place of mailing are within State of adds 5 calendar days to the period of notice]; see Code of Civil Procedure section 1010.6(a)(3)(B) [service by email adds two court days to "any period of notice"].) Defendants served their moving papers on Defendant by email on 3/19/2026, which is not 16 court days plus two court days before 4/13/2026, the hearing date noticed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
